summary: Tested ZKTeco biometric device integration for POS system. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). All 10 frontend UI features verified. Backend APIs: create device, list devices, sync-from-agent with deduplication, update employee biometric_uid. Frontend: HR page shows البصمة column, إصدار الكل للبصمة button, fingerprint action buttons with UID badges, Biometric tab with agent status (غير متصل), device list, instructions card.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: BiometricDeviceCreate model (line 13619-13624) has name, ip_address, port, branch_id, device_type fields
VERIFIED: GET /api/biometric/devices (line 13636-13644) returns devices list with _id excluded
VERIFIED: POST /api/biometric/devices (line 13646-13666) creates device with UUID, tenant_id, is_active=True
VERIFIED: EmployeeUpdate model (line 1422-1434) includes biometric_uid field
VERIFIED: HR.js (line 1179) shows البصمة column header in employees table
VERIFIED: HR.js (line 1077-1081) has إصدار الكل للبصمة button with data-testid
VERIFIED: HR.js (line 1192-1197) shows biometric_uid badge with green styling
VERIFIED: HR.js (line 1206-1210) has fingerprint action button with UID indicator
VERIFIED: BiometricDevices.js (line 260-282) shows agent status card with غير متصل/متصل badge
VERIFIED: BiometricDevices.js (line 285-303) shows instructions card with local network requirements
VERIFIED: BiometricDevices.js (line 109-155) handles agent offline gracefully with error toast
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Device for testing (192.168.1.200:4370). Test attendance records synced to device 697db1ae-642a-4db0-a6f7-7d1a03064129.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ZKTeco biometric integration fully tested. Test data: Employee أحمد محمد (id: d6e117f3-7298-4010-81f1-d4c1cc889f22, biometric_uid: 1), Device بصمة تجريبية (id: 697db1ae-642a-4db0-a6f7-7d1a03064129, ip: 192.168.0.35, port: 4370). The local agent (localhost:9999) is NOT running in preview - agent status correctly shows غير متصل. Backend sync-from-agent endpoint handles deduplication correctly.

verified_features.details: Created device with name, IP, port, branch_id. Returns device with UUID and is_active=True
Returns array of devices with id, name, ip_address, port, branch_id, is_active, last_sync
Synced 3 test records. Returns records_count, total_received, duplicates_skipped
Same records sent twice - second sync correctly skipped all as duplicates
Updated employee biometric_uid to 99, verified persistence, restored to 1

verified_features.feature: Frontend: HR page البصمة column header
verified_features.details: Table header shows البصمة column between الراتب and الحالة
Button with fingerprint icon in employees header, data-testid='push-all-biometric-btn'

verified_features.feature: Frontend: Fingerprint action button with UID badge
verified_features.details: Each employee row has fingerprint button showing #N when biometric_uid set

verified_features.feature: Frontend: Biometric tab agent status card
verified_features.details: Shows وكيل Maestro المحلي with غير متصل badge (red) - expected in preview
Shows 3 devices with name, IP:port, branch, type, last_sync, test/sync/delete buttons
Shows تعليمات الربط with local network requirements and agent v2.4+ instructions

notes: The ZKTeco integration uses a local agent architecture (print_server.ps1 v2.4). The local agent runs on user's Windows machine and communicates with ZKTeco device on LAN. Frontend correctly handles agent-offline state with غير متصل status and error toasts. All backend APIs work correctly. No mocked APIs - local agent (localhost:9999) is real but not running in preview environment.
